zh.lifeSummary: 當Rudolf I. von Tübingen於1160年出生在德國爾特波格奧拉赤 蒂賓根時，他的父親Hugo IV VON TUBINGEN36歲，母親Elisabeth von Bregenz30歲。他於1181年7月30日與Gräfin Mechthild von Gleiberg結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1219年3月17日享年59歲，埋葬在德國巴登-爾特波格藍德可萊斯 蒂賓根蒂賓根貝本豪森貝本豪森 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rudolf I. von Tübingen于1160年出生在德国爾特波格奧拉赤 蒂賓根时，他的父亲Hugo IV VON TUBINGEN36岁，母亲Elisabeth von Bregenz30岁。他于1181年7月30日与Gräfin Mechthild von Gleiberg结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1219年3月17日享年59岁，埋葬在德国巴登-爾特波格藍德可萊斯 蒂賓根蒂賓根貝本豪森貝本豪森 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Rudolf
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Latinized version, Rudolphus, of the Germanic name Hrōdwulf ( see Rolf ). It was introduced to the English-speaking world from Germany in the 19th century. Rudolf was a hereditary name among the Habsburgs, the Holy Roman Emperors and rulers of Austria, from the Emperor Rudolf I ( 1218–91 ) to the Archduke Rudolf , Crown Prince of Austria-Hungary, who died in mysterious circumstances at his country house at Meyerling in 1889 . Rudolf Rassendyll was the central character of Anthony Hope's adventure stories The Prisoner of Zenda ( 1894 ) and Rupert of Hentzau ( 1898 ), in which he is an English gentleman who bears a great physical resemblance to the King of Ruritania, to whom he is distantly related. He successfully impersonates the king for reasons of state. In the early 20th century the popularity of this name was further enhanced by the American silent-film actor Rudolph Valentino ( 1895–1926 ), born in Italy as Rodolfo di Valentina d'Antonguolla . It has not been used much in recent times, perhaps being inextricably associated with ‘the red-nosed reindeer’ of the Christmas song.

variants.name: Rudolph
meanings: From a Latinized version, Rudolphus, of the Germanic name Hrōdwulf ( see Rolf ). It was introduced to the English-speaking world from Germany in the 19th century. Rudolf was a hereditary name among the Habsburgs, the Holy Roman Emperors and rulers of Austria, from the Emperor Rudolf I ( 1218–91 ) to the Archduke Rudolf , Crown Prince of Austria-Hungary, who died in mysterious circumstances at his country house at Meyerling in 1889 . Rudolf Rassendyll was the central character of Anthony Hope's adventure stories The Prisoner of Zenda ( 1894 ) and Rupert of Hentzau ( 1898 ), in which he is an English gentleman who bears a great physical resemblance to the King of Ruritania, to whom he is distantly related. He successfully impersonates the king for reasons of state. In the early 20th century the popularity of this name was further enhanced by the American silent-film actor Rudolph Valentino ( 1895–1926 ), born in Italy as Rodolfo di Valentina d'Antonguolla . It has not been used much in recent times, perhaps being inextricably associated with ‘the red-nosed reindeer’ of the Christmas song.

en.lifeSummary: When Rudolf I. von Tübingen was born in 1160, in Tübingen, Württemberg, Germany, his father, Hugo IV VON TUBINGEN, was 36 and his mother, Elisabeth von Bregenz, was 30. He married Gräfin Mechthild von Gleiberg on 30 July 1181. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 17 March 1219, at the age of 59, and was buried in Bebenhausen Cemetery, Bebenhausen, Tübingen, Tübingen, Baden-Württemberg, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rudolf I. von Tübingen est né en 1160, à Oberamt Tübingen, Württemberg, Allemagne, son père, Hugo IV VON TUBINGEN, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Elisabeth von Bregenz, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Gräfin Mechthild von Gleiberg le 30 juillet 1181. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 17 mars 1219, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Bebenhausen Cemetery, Bebenhausen, Tübingen, Landkreis Tübingen, Baden-Württemberg, Allemagne.

ko.lifeSummary: Rudolf I. von Tübingen(이)가 1160년 독일 wu르테버그 오베램트 트u빙에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugo IV VON TUBINGEN(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Elisabeth von Bregenz(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1181년 7월 30일 Gräfin Mechthild von Gleiberg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1219년 3월 17일 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 바데-wu르테버그 랜드크레이스 트u빙 트u빙 베벤하우센 베벤하우센 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rudolf I. von Tübingen nasceu em 1160, em Oberamt Tübingen, Württemberg, Alemanha, seu pai, Hugo IV VON TUBINGEN, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Elisabeth von Bregenz, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Gräfin Mechthild von Gleiberg em 30 de julho de 1181. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 17 de março de 1219, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em Bebenhausen Cemetery, Bebenhausen, Tübingen, Landkreis Tübingen, Baden-Württemberg, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rudolf I. von Tübingen родился в 1160 г. в местности обирамт тuбинген, вuрттембирг, Германия, его отцу по имени Hugo IV VON TUBINGEN было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Elisabeth von Bregenz, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Gräfin Mechthild von Gleiberg 30 июля 1181 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 17 марта 1219 г. в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности бебенаусен кеметири, бебенаусен, тuбинген, ландкрис тuбинген, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия.

Se casó con Gräfin Mechthild von Gleiberg el 30 de julio de 1181. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 17 de marzo de 1219, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en Bebenhausen Cemetery, Bebenhausen, Tübingen, Landkreis Tübingen, Baden-Württemberg, Alemania.
